items.title: Solana Changelog: July 16, 2026
items.summary: Agave, Firedancer, Frankendancer, Solana Program JS SDKs, LiteSVM, Mollusk, and Surfpool shipped new releases.

items.title: The Sun Rises in Seoul and Trades on Solana: $SKHY is Now Live
items.summary: SK Hynix ($SKHY), South Korea’s dominant memory-chip maker, is now live on Solana.

items.title: Solana Changelog: July 9, 2026
items.summary: Agave, Firedancer, Superbank, Solana Go, and LiteSVM published new releases alongside validator, RPC, and tooling updates.

items.title: Solana Changelog: Agave v4.1.0, RPC 2.0, and Alpenglow
items.summary: Agave v4.1.0, Solana Kit v7.0.0, Cloudbreak RPC methods, and Alpenglow feature-flag work led this week’s Solana engineering updates.
